channel.description: Catchup with The Edge Breakfast with Meg and Randell: All the best bits every week with podcast exclusive content and some extra fun stuff when it comes up. [archive]

item.title: The Edge Breakfast meet Raising The Curve
item.itunes:title: The Edge Breakfast meet Raising The Curve
item.description:
Sophie & Vic from Raising the Curve podcast popped into studio to explain the basics of investing and finance! Soph decided that there wasn't enough out there for women who are keen on achieving financial freedom so she teamed up with her mate Vic, a fund manager, to start a podcast.
Randell and Steph had a chat about where to start and got some hot tips on how to make it big! Well, at least some thoughts about smart investing...
Listen to the chat, and the first episode of Season 2 of the Curve... then check out the series on rova or wherever you get your podcast now!
https://www.rova.nz/home/podcasts/raising-the-curve.html
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: Check out Tic-Heads!
item.itunes:title: Check out Tic-Heads!
item.content:encoded:
Hey Team! We'd love to share with you our new series starring our very own Randell! This is episode one, and if you like what you hear, CLICK HERE to listen to the rest of the series! Enjoy!

EP 1: Why'd you c***'s have to make me cry! 😭

This is Tic-Heads, with Uncle Tics AKA Leighton Clarke a NZ Tik Tok legend who has Tourettes!

Join Uncle Tics and Edge Breakfast host, Clinton Randell as we find out about Leighton's life with Tourettes and Tik Tok, meet his mates and co-stars Uncle Jack & Tahu Hollis and we get the dirt from Leighton's superhero Mum Karla!

Tic-Heads 

@ticheads TikTok - Instagram

Uncle Tics AKA Leighton Clarke

@UncleTics TikTok - Instagram

Clinton Randell

@Clintonrandell - Instagram

Uncle Jack

@Unclejacktai TikTok - Instagram

Tahu Hollis

@TahuHollis TikTok - Instagram

rova 

@rovaapp TikTok - Instagram

Twofold - Theme Music - download it for free here:

https://soundcloud.com/twofoldnz/uncle-tics-podcast-theme-tic-heads

@twofoldnzdjs - Instagram

  1. Meet Leighton Clarke AKA Uncle Tics!
  2. Meet Uncle Jack & Tahu Hollis!
  3. How Uncle Tics got 3 MILLION followers in 12 months!
  4. What Triggers Uncle Tics Tourettes?
  5. We Call Uncle Tic's Mum!
  6. What's It Like To Live With Uncle Tics?

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: rova | The Edge
